kpiDefinitionRows.notes: Order-level total. Uses unique orders because `Order Amount` repeats on each line item.
Represents order-total net after refunds, not merchant payout net. Fees and commissions are not present in the export.
Line-level merchandise gross before discounts and before order-level refunds.
Line-level merchandise net after item discounts but before refunds.
Valid orders exclude canceled orders. Refunded and returned orders remain valid because they were placed and processed.

kpiDefinitionRows.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT order_id WHERE paid_time is not null)
COUNT(DISTINCT order_id WHERE status indicates cancel)
COUNT(DISTINCT order_id WHERE order_refund_amount > 0 OR cancel_return_type includes refund)
COUNT(DISTINCT order_id WHERE returned_quantity > 0 OR cancel_return_type includes return)
COUNT(DISTINCT order_id WHERE delivered_time exists OR status indicates delivered/completed)

kpiDefinitionRows.notes: Order-level total. Does not allocate refunds down to product level.

kpiDefinitionRows.formula: COUNT(customer_id with more than one valid order)

kpiDefinitionRows.notes: Uses the first populated customer identifier based on config priority.

kpiDefinitionRows.formula: COUNT(daily periods with at least one order)
COUNT(weekly periods with at least one order)
COUNT(monthly periods with at least one order)

kpiDefinitionRows.formatted_value: Birria Bombs 2 Pack by EZ Bombs Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor
kpiDefinitionRows.formula: Top row from product_kpis ordered by net_merchandise_sales DESC

reportMarkdown:
# TikTok Shop KPI Report

## Inputs Used
- `All orders\April 2024.csv`
- `All orders\April 2025.csv`
- `All orders\August 2024.csv`
- `All orders\August 2025.csv`
- `All orders\December 2024.csv`
- `All orders\December 2025.csv`
- `All orders\February 2024.csv`
- `All orders\February 2025.csv`
- `All orders\February 2026.csv`
- `All orders\January 2025.csv`
- `All orders\January 2026.csv`
- `All orders\July 2024.csv`
- `All orders\July 2025.csv`
- `All orders\June 2024.csv`
- `All orders\June 2025.csv`
- `All orders\March 2024.csv`
- `All orders\March 2025.csv`
- `All orders\March 2026.csv`
- `All orders\May 2024.csv`
- `All orders\May 2025.csv`
- `All orders\November 2024.csv`
- `All orders\November 2025.csv`
- `All orders\October 2024.csv`
- `All orders\October 2025.csv`
- `All orders\September 2024.csv`
- `All orders\September 2025.csv`

## Excluded By Discovery
- `Replacements\Replacements 2025.csv`
- `Replacements\Replacements 2026.csv`
- `Samples\Samples 2024.csv`
- `Samples\Samples 2025.csv`
- `Samples\Samples 2026.csv`

## Summary
- **gross_sales**: 20,215,401.10
- **net_sales**: 19,512,230.75
- **total_orders**: 980,880
- **valid_orders**: 959,393
- **canceled_orders**: 21,487
- **refunded_orders**: 35,873
- **returned_orders**: 36,687
- **refund_rate**: 0.04
- **return_rate**: 0.04
- **cancellation_rate**: 0.02
- **aov_gross**: 21.07
- **units_sold**: 1595242
- **repeat_customer_rate**: 0.26

## Detected Column Mapping
| Canonical field | Source column |
| --- | --- |
| `address_line_1` | `Address Line 1` |
| `address_line_2` | `Address Line 2` |
| `buyer_message` | `Buyer Message` |
| `buyer_nickname` | `Buyer Nickname` |
| `buyer_username` | `Buyer Username` |
| `cancel_by` | `Cancel By` |
| `cancel_reason` | `Cancel Reason` |
| `cancel_return_type` | `Cancelation/Return Type` |
| `cancelled_time` | `Cancelled Time` |
| `city` | `City` |
| `cofunded_shipping_fee_discount` | `Co-Funded Shipping Fee Discount` |
| `combined_listing` | `Combined Listing` |
| `country` | `Country` |
| `created_time` | `Created Time` |
| `delivered_time` | `Delivered Time` |
| `delivery_instruction` | `Delivery Instruction` |
| `delivery_option` | `Delivery Option` |
| `delivery_option_type` | `Delivery Option Type` |
| `fulfillment_type` | `Fulfillment Type` |
| `normal_preorder` | `Normal or Pre-order` |
| `order_amount` | `Order Amount` |
| `order_id` | `Order ID` |
| `order_refund_amount` | `Order Refund Amount` |
| `order_status` | `Order Status` |
| `order_substatus` | `Order Substatus` |
| `original_shipping_fee` | `Original Shipping Fee` |
| `package_id` | `Package ID` |
| `paid_time` | `Paid Time` |
| `payment_method` | `Payment Method` |
| `payment_platform_discount` | `Payment platform discount` |
| `phone` | `Phone #` |
| `product_category` | `Product Category` |
| `product_name` | `Product Name` |
| `quantity` | `Quantity` |
| `recipient` | `Recipient` |
| `retail_delivery_fee` | `Retail Delivery Fee` |
| `returned_quantity` | `Sku Quantity of return` |
| `rts_time` | `RTS Time` |
| `seller_note` | `Seller Note` |
| `seller_sku` | `Seller SKU` |
| `shipped_time` | `Shipped Time` |
| `shipping_fee_after_discount` | `Shipping Fee After Discount` |
| `shipping_fee_platform_discount` | `Shipping Fee Platform Discount` |
| `shipping_fee_seller_discount` | `Shipping Fee Seller Discount` |
| `shipping_information` | `Shipping Information` |
| `shipping_provider_name` | `Shipping Provider Name` |
| `sku_id` | `SKU ID` |
| `sku_platform_discount` | `SKU Platform Discount` |
| `sku_seller_discount` | `SKU Seller Discount` |
| `sku_subtotal_after_discount` | `SKU Subtotal After Discount` |
| `sku_subtotal_before_discount` | `SKU Subtotal Before Discount` |
| `sku_unit_original_price` | `SKU Unit Original Price` |
| `state` | `State` |
| `taxes` | `Taxes` |
| `tracking_id` | `Tracking ID` |
| `variation` | `Variation` |
| `virtual_bundle_seller_sku` | ` Virtual Bundle Seller SKU` |
| `warehouse_name` | `Warehouse Name` |
| `weight_kg` | `Weight(kg)` |
| `zipcode` | `Zipcode` |

## Coverage and Assumptions
- Reporting date basis used for time KPIs: `paid_time`
- `gross_sales` uses unique order-level `Order Amount` values because the export repeats them on every line item.
- `net_sales` is gross sales minus order refund amount. It is not merchant payout net because fee and commission fields are not present.
- `valid_orders` excludes canceled orders but keeps refunded and returned orders as processed orders.
- Product-level refund dollars are not allocated when refunds occur on multi-line orders.

## Dataset Quality Checks
- Raw line rows after cleaning: `1,363,732`
- Unique orders: `980,880`
- Multi-line orders: `337,673`
- Unique customers with chosen identifier: `674,512`

## Daily Trend Highlight
- Best day by gross sales: `2024-07-09` with `134,957.85`

## Weekly Trend Highlight
- Best week start: `2024-07-08` with `702,711.77`

## Monthly Trend Highlight
- Best month start: `2024-07-01` with `2,383,133.38`

## Top Products
| Product | Orders | Units | Net Merchandise Sales |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| Birria Bombs 2 Pack by EZ Bombs Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor | 279070 | 352,536 | 5,340,074.60 |
| Birria Bombs 2 Pack by EZ Bombs - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 131541 | 160,956 | 2,200,080.14 |
| Birria Bombs 2 Pack by EZ Bombs - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 112757 | 139,313 | 2,095,675.48 |
| Birria Bombs 2 Pack by EZ Bombs - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 101250 | 124,752 | 1,792,069.68 |
| EZ BOMBS BirriaBombs 2 Bombs Per Pack - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 100952 | 128,566 | 1,658,162.83 |
| Birria Bombs bundle by EZ Bombs - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 37327 | 62,294 | 1,519,885.24 |
| EZ BOMBS BirriaBombs 2 Bombs Per Pack - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 62136 | 81,679 | 1,039,051.10 |
| EZ BOMBS Birria Bombs 2 Bomb Pack - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 53240 | 60,173 | 821,849.85 |
| EZ BOMBS Birria Bombs 2 Bomb Pack - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 53240 | 60,173 | 821,849.85 |
| Birria and Pozole Bombs bundle by EZ Bombs - Seasoning Spice Bomb Flavor for Authentic Mexican Dishes - Traditional | 21364 | 35,932 | 805,565.90 |

## Exceptions and Warnings
- Default discovery used the `All orders` folder and excluded auxiliary folders `Samples` and `Replacements`. Set `include_auxiliary_folders` to true to include them.
- Removed 9 embedded header row(s) from the data.
- Product-level refund dollars are not calculated because refunds are order-level and many orders are multi-line.

## Output Files
- `kpi_summary.csv`
- `kpi_full.csv`
- `daily_breakdown.csv`
- `product_kpis.csv`
- `report.md`
